case_title: DINA MONCADA VS. MOBILE MODULAR MANAGEMENT CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MONCADA, DINA AS TO DEFENDANT MOBILE MODULAR MANAGEMENT CORPORATION MCGRATH RENTCORP ZEPEDA, RAMIRO DELOEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2023 BY MARY E. WISS. PLAINTIFF DINA MONCADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOBILE MANAGEMENT CORPORATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANA HANSON REGIONAL DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT MCGRATH RENTCORP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DANA HANSON, REGIONAL DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT RAMIRO DELEON ZEPEDA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MARY WISS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D305)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE APR-24-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(RAMIRO DELOEN ZEPEDA)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING: 2/14/23 @ 3:30PM];(REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, DINA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-14-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-28-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONCADA, DINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOBILE MODULAR MANAGEMENT CORPORATION MCGRATH RENTCORP $8,456.21 PRINCIPAL, $294.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,751.01, SEE ATTACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
